mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_EXER_TRAN ( USER_UUID , EXER_DATE , EXER_STIME , EXER_ETIME , EXER_NAME , EXER_INT , EXER_CNT , REG_DTTM , MOD_DTTM ) VALUES ( #{userUuid}, DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(#{exerDate}, '%Y-%m-%d'), '%Y%m%d'), #{exerStime}, #{exerEtime}, #{exerName}, #{exerInt}, #{exerCnt}, NOW(), NOW() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE USER_UUID = #{userUuid}, EXER_DATE = DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(#{exerDate}, '%Y-%m-%d'), '%Y%m%d'), EXER_STIME = #{exerStime}, EXER_ETIME = #{exerEtime}, EXER_NAME = #{exerName}, EXER_INT = #{exerInt}, EXER_CNT = #{exerCnt}, MOD_DTTM = NOW()
mapper.select: WITH RANKED AS( SELECT EXER_SEQ , USER_UUID , DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(EXER_DATE, '%Y%m%d'), '%Y-%m-%d') AS EXER_DATE , EXER_STIME , EXER_ETIME , EXER_NAME , EXER_INT , EXER_CNT , REG_DTTM , MOD_DTTM , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY EXER_DATE ORDER BY EXER_DATE , EXER_ETIME DESC) AS RN , TIMESTAMPDIFF( MINUTE, STR_TO_DATE(LPAD(EXER_STIME, 6, '0'), '%H%i%s'), STR_TO_DATE(LPAD(EXER_ETIME, 6, '0'), '%H%i%s') ) AS EXER_MINUTES FROM T_EXER_TRAN WHERE STR_TO_DATE(EXER_DATE, '%Y%m%d') BETWEEN STR_TO_DATE(REPLACE(#{startDt}, '-', ''), '%Y%m%d') AND STR_TO_DATE(REPLACE(#{endDt}, '-', ''), '%Y%m%d') AND USER_UUID = #{userUuid} ) SELECT EXER_SEQ , CASE WHEN RN = 1 THEN EXER_DATE ELSE EXER_DATE END EXER_DATE , EXER_STIME , EXER_ETIME , EXER_NAME , EXER_MINUTES FROM RANKED ORDER BY EXER_DATE DESC , EXER_STIME DESC

SELECT USER_UUID , DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(EXER_DATE, '%Y%m%d'), '%Y-%m-%d') AS EXER_DATE , EXER_STIME , EXER_ETIME , EXER_NAME , EXER_INT , EXER_CNT , REG_DTTM , MOD_DTTM FROM T_EXER_TRAN WHERE EXER_DATE = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d') AND USER_UUID = #{userUuid}

SELECT SUM( TIMESTAMPDIFF( MINUTE, STR_TO_DATE(EXER_STIME, '%H%i%s'), STR_TO_DATE(EXER_ETIME, '%H%i%s') ) ) AS minutes FROM T_EXER_TRAN WHERE EXER_DATE = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d') AND USER_UUID = #{userUuid};
